title: Mathematics of a Child Asking Why Five Times

analysis.object: T656: Mathematics of a Child Asking Why Five Times depth analysis

first_why_eml0.description: First why: EML-0 (what is the fact?)
first_why_eml0.reason: First why asks for EML-0: the discrete fact

second_why_eml1.description: Second why: EML-1 (what caused it? exponential chain)
second_why_eml1.reason: Second why asks for EML-1: the causal chain

third_why_eml2.description: Third why: EML-2 (how do we measure/know that?)
third_why_eml2.reason: Third why asks for EML-2: the epistemological ground

fourth_why_eml3.description: Fourth why: EML-3 (but what about exceptions? oscillation)
fourth_why_eml3.reason: Fourth why asks for EML-3: the oscillatory complexity, the exceptions

fifth_why_emlinf.description: Fifth why: EML-inf horizon; parent says because that is just how it is
fifth_why_emlinf.reason: Fifth why hits EML-inf: every why-chain terminates at EML-inf; that is what philosophy IS

analysis.theorem: T656: Mathematics of a Child Asking Why Five Times (S935).
